name: Daiichi Jitsugyo Co., Ltd.
summary: Daiichi Jitsugyo Co., Ltd., a general machinery trading company, supplies industrial equipment in Japan and internationally. It operates through Plant & Energy Business, Industrial Machinery Business, Electronics Business, Automotive Business, Pharmaceuticals Business, and Aviation Business segments. The Plant & Energy Business segment offers machinery and equipment for energy development and production, oil and gas refining, chemicals and fertilizers, engineering, construction, and pulp and paper industries. It also manufactures lithium ion batteries; and produces renewable energy. The Industrial Machinery Business segment provides factory automation and flexible manufacturing systems, peripheral equipment, and various automated assembly lines for manufacturing household appliances, housing equipment, and medical equipment, as well as plastics, rubber, steel, and food industries. The Electronics Business segment offers printed circuit board assembly systems, electronic device systems, and automation equipment for various industries, such as electronics, IT, electric machinery, precision, optical, audio, and musical instruments. The Automotive Business segment provides automobile assembly equipment, interior/exterior auto parts, powertrain components, and car-mounted devices, as well as equipment for various processes, including resin/metal molding and processing, surface treatment, assembly, and inspections. The Pharmaceuticals Business segment offers various equipment, such as visual inspection systems for tablets and capsules, tablet printing inspection systems, and automatic packaging lines for solid and injectable drugs for the pharmaceutical and medical industries. The Aviation Business segment provides ground support and airport facility-related equipment for aviation and disaster prevention. Daiichi Jitsugyo Co., Ltd. was founded in 1948 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
